sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14090" key="a)poto/rnwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποτόρν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14090.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rounding off</tr_> as by the lathe, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:7:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.7.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
